creator: oberman@es.net
text:
Rainer,

I have now confirmed that dvdrip 0.98.1 runs correctly as long as I have
LD_PRELOAD defined as /usr/lib/libpthread.so.

I suspect that your window or session manager is already linked to a
threading library and that this is why it works for you. I'm unsure how
best to handle this for Perl scripts which happen to call routines wish
use threading. Maybe I should ask about this on some FreeBSD list (I
guess I'll start on questions, although the folks most likely to have an
answer don't spend much time there.
-- 
R. Kevin Oberman, Network Engineer
Energy Sciences Network (ESnet)
Ernest O. Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory (Berkeley Lab)
E-mail: oberman@es.net			Phone: +1 510 486-8634
